text:
Evangelion Symphony is a video of an orchestral live recording featuring music from the anime series Neon Genesis Evangelion. It was released on LaserDisc and VHS. https://www.lddb.com/laserdisc/17741/KILA-339/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion:-Symphonic-Orchestra-Live 
It was recorded at the Bunkamura Orchard Hall on July 1997. It was released on 04 March 1998 with the catalog number KILA-339 (LD) and KIVA-339 (VHS) by King Records' label STARCHILD. 
Shirō Sagisu composed the music, the conductor was Derrick Inouye and it was performed by New Japan Philharmonic Orchestra.
